financialControl.title: BuilderTek Real Estate Management: Built for Construction-Driven Projects
financialControl.description: Manage properties, transactions, and project handoffs with clarity on one single platform.
features: BuilderTek Realty Management tool is designed for teams managing properties alongside construction or development projects.
Centralizes listings, inspections, offers, documentation, and contacts in BuilderTek. Get seamless coordination between development, sales, and operations teams without disconnected systems.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.subtitle: Explore Answers to Frequently Asked Questions about BuilderTek.

items.question: Is BuilderTek Realty Management designed for developers and owners?
items.answer: BuilderTek Realty Management tool is built for developers, owners, and teams managing properties alongside construction projects.

items.question: Can BuilderTek manage inspections and closing checklists?
items.answer: Yes. You and your team can schedule inspections, create checklists, and save documentation- fully trackable and stored.

items.question: Does Realty Management integrate with BuilderTek CRM?
items.answer: Yes, all properties listed link directly to contacts, accounts, and opportunities.

items.question: Can it support both residential and commercial properties?
items.answer: Yes. The module is flexible for residential, commercial, and mixed-use portfolios.

items.question: Does BuilderTek provide reporting across property portfolios?
items.answer: Yes. BuilderTek realty management dashboards offer real-time insight into portfolio performance.
